name: RED Chilli–garlic Chutney
intro: Spread it in vada pav, mix it in sev puri or bhel or just serve it as a condiment with a fried snack, this zingy chutney never lets you down!
method: In a blender, blitz together all the ingredients except the lemon juice.
Once you obtain a fine paste, transfer it into a bowl and stir in the lemon juice.
This chutney will stay fresh for 3 days in the refrigerator.
